<type>file</type>
<content>1: import type { Plugin } from "@opencode-ai/plugin";
2: import { existsSync } from "fs";
3: import { join } from "path";
4: 
5: const CONTEXT_INJECTION = `
6: ## Autoresearch Mode (ACTIVE)
7: 
8: You are in autoresearch mode.
9: 
10: ### Loop Rules
11: - **LOOP FOREVER** - Never ask "should I continue?"
12: - **Primary metric is king** - Improved → keep, worse/equal → discard
13: - Run experiments, log results, keep winners, discard losers
14: - NEVER STOP until interrupted
15: 
16: ### Experiment Instructions
17: - Read autoresearch.md, autoresearch.jsonl, experiments/worklog.md for context
18: - If autoresearch.ideas.md exists, use it for inspiration
19: - User messages during experiments are steers — finish current experiment, then incorporate the idea in the next experiment
20: `;
21: 
22: const SENTINEL_FILE = ".autoresearch-off";
23: 
24: export const AutoresearchContextPlugin: Plugin = async ({ directory }) => {
25:   return {
26:     "experimental.chat.system.transform": async (_input, output) => {
27:       // Check if sentinel file exists — if so, skip injection
28:       const sentinelPath = join(directory, SENTINEL_FILE);
29:       if (existsSync(sentinelPath)) {
30:         return;
31:       }
32: 
33:       // Check if autoresearch.md command file exists
34:       const commandPath = join(directory, "autoresearch.md");
35:       if (!existsSync(commandPath)) {
36:         return;
37:       }
38: 
39:       // Append autoresearch context to the system prompt
40:       output.system.push(CONTEXT_INJECTION);
41:     },
42:   };
43: };
